name: arkenstone

scripts.deploy:local: hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/ArkenDeploy.js --network localhost && node scripts/update-frontend-addresses.js && node scripts/sync-admin-env.js
scripts.deploy:sepolia: hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/ArkenDeploy.js --network sepolia && CHAIN_ID=11155111 node scripts/update-frontend-addresses.js

description: This project demonstrates a basic Hardhat use case. It comes with a sample contract, a test for that contract, and a Hardhat Ignition module that deploys that contract.
